author: govinda dńĀsa
verses:
bhajahuŐź re mana, Ňõrńę-nanda-nandana,
abhaya caraŠĻáńĀravinda re
durlabha mńĀnava‚čÖ, janama satsaŠĻÖge,
taraha e bhava-sindhu re

Ňõńęta‚čÖńĀtapa, vńĀta‚čÖvariŠĻ£aŠĻáa,
e dina jńĀminńę jńĀgi‚Äô re
viphale sevinu, kŠĻõpaŠĻáa durajana,
capala sukha‚čÖlava lńĀgi‚Äô re

e dhana, jauvana, putra‚čÖparijana,
ithe ki ńĀche paratńęti re
kamaladala‚čÖjala, jńęvana ŠĻ≠alamala,
bhajahuŐź hari-pada niti re

ŇõravaŠĻáa, kńęrtana, smaraŠĻáa, vandana,
pńĀdasevana, dńĀsya re
pŇęjana, sakhńę-jana, ńĀtmanivedana,
govindadńĀsa abhilńĀŠĻ£a re
en_translation:
O mind, worship the fearless lotus feet of the son of Nanda. Having attained this rare human birth, cross over this ocean of material existence in the association of saintly persons.

Remaining awake day and night in cold, heat, wind, and rain, I have fruitlessly served miserly and wicked people just for a fleeting drop of happiness.

What reliability is there in wealth, youth, children, or family? Life is as unsteady as a drop of water on a lotus petal; therefore, always worship the feet of the Lord.

Hearing, chanting, remembering, offering prayers, serving the Lord's feet, servitude, worship, friendship, and self-surrender‚ÄĒthis is the heartfelt desire of Govinda dńĀsa.
